title: R29 — Real Anonymous Connect matchmaker (30-sec queue)
notes: NEW: Anonymous Connect now uses a real Supabase queue. When you tap 'Find Someone', you join a live queue and the system polls every 2 sec for a partner. If found within 30 sec, both sides auto-start a free voice call via the existing Agora pipeline.
NEW: Live countdown timer shows 'Xs left' during the 30-sec search window. Cancel button lets you bail out anytime.
NEW: Interest-based scoring — users with the most shared interests get matched first. Then by oldest waiter (fairness).
NEW: Skip logic preserved — skipped partners stay in your exclude list for the session so you don't re-match them.
REQUIRES: Migration 0019_anonymous_queue.sql applied in Supabase (creates the anonymous_queue table + RPCs).
